ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., Viagra Soft) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer name */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit for inventory management */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  "label" TEXT /* Product label and instructions */,
  "prescription_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a prescription is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the package belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of pills in the package */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the package */,
  "per_pill_price" TEXT /* Price per pill */,
  "savings" TEXT /* Savings compared to buying individual pills */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the package image */,
  "is_on_sale" INTEGER /* Indicates if the package is on sale */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price of the package during a sale */,
  "bonus_pills" INTEGER /* Number of bonus pills included */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping for the package */,
  "free_shipping" INTEGER /* Indicates if the package has free shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "total_discount" TEXT /* Total discount applied to the order */,
  "total_shipping" TEXT /* Total shipping cost for the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the package in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the package */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price for the order item (quantity * unit price) */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is from a verified purchase */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the review */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the package in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger a restock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the discount applies to */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the discount is currently active */,
  "minimum_order_amount" TEXT /* Minimum order amount required to apply the discount */,
  "maximum_discount" TEXT /* Maximum discount that can be applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
